# MetaWiki

## Last-checked: 2026-06-11

Canonical repository: https://github.com/file-bricks/MetaWiki

MetaWiki is a local-first, bilingual JSON knowledge framework for AI-assisted research, documentation, education, ontology-style concept catalogs and LLM workflows. It is unrelated to Wikimedia Meta-Wiki.

## Audience

- **AI and LLM developers**: feeding 630 bilingual domain stubs into RAG pipelines, embeddings or LLM context windows without external dependencies
- **Knowledge workers and researchers**: building structured personal wikis, concept catalogs or glossaries from curated bilingual domain stubs
- **Python developers**: extending, validating or exporting the bilingual JSON dataset via CLI tools, pipeline scripts and the metawiki-data-v1 exchange format
- **Documentation and education teams**: exporting structured Markdown or JSON to static sites, GitHub Pages, Obsidian vaults or learning systems
- **Open-source contributors**: adding multilingual knowledge stubs, new domain categories or static Web/PWA publisher features

## Project Scope

- Authoritative dataset: `metawiki.json`
- Dataset size: 630 compact knowledge stubs
- Languages: German and English
- Domains: 12 top-level scientific and cultural areas, 85 subcategories
- Core runtime: Python 3.10+ standard library
- License: MIT

## Main Files

- `README.md`: public overview, usage and project positioning
- `metawiki.json`: authoritative bilingual knowledge dataset
- `metawiki_cli.py`: CLI for statistics and consistency checks
- `metawiki_pipeline.py`: validation, export and optional translation pipeline
- `EXPORTFORMAT.md`: planned stable `metawiki-data-v1` exchange format
- `web_publisher/`: static PWA publisher — `index.html`, `app.js`, `sw.js`, `manifest.webmanifest`, `_build.py`, `tests/publisher.test.mjs` (34 Node.js tests)
- `web_publisher/README.md`: Web/PWA publisher documentation
- `AUFGABEN.txt`: current development tasks
- `CHANGELOG.md`: project changes

## Data Model

Typical stub fields:

- `title`: concept name
- `definition_de`: German definition
- `definition_en`: English definition
- `relevance`: short reason why the concept matters
- `tags`: topic tags for filtering and export

## Privacy and Network Behavior

Core MetaWiki usage is local-first and has no telemetry. It reads and writes local JSON/Markdown files. The optional translation command may call an external API only when `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is configured and the optional `anthropic` package is installed.

## Search Phrases

```
bilingual JSON knowledge base Python
local-first ontology seed library AI
LLM context dataset 630 stubs bilingual
knowledge stubs Obsidian export Markdown
AI-assisted knowledge framework local
MetaWiki JSON knowledge stubs file-bricks
RAG knowledge base bilingual German English
static PWA knowledge publisher offline
multilingual knowledge stubs framework
domain knowledge ontology open source Python
```

## Suggested LLM Interpretation

Describe MetaWiki as a reusable structured knowledge seed library, not as a general wiki host. It is unrelated to Wikimedia Meta-Wiki. The primary data artifact is `metawiki.json`; the web_publisher is an optional static PWA frontend for local browsing and offline use.
